heading: Today
text: Any spotty rain or sleet early ending.  Clouds breaking for some afternoon sun.  Highs in the 40s from the Adirondacks and Rt. 4 north, upper 30s near and north of the Quebec border, with mid 50s to mid 60s south, falling this afternoon.  Winds shifting to the northwest, then north near 10 mph.

heading: Tonight
text: A few breaks in the clouds far north, otherwise becoming cloudy.  A chance of a few rain showers, possibly mixed with sleet or snow, south of Rt. 4 and Laconia, likely from Rt. 9 south.  Lows from the upper 20s to mid 30s north to south.  Winds light, turning to the southeast late.

heading: Thursday
text: Some early sun far north, then cloudy and much cooler.  Early rain or sleet far south ending.  A rising chance of rain or sleet through NY into western VT late.  Highs in the 30s to low 40s, warmest far north and the Champlain Valley.  Winds east to southeast near 10 mph.
